'''tamasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibu|ibu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibu|ibu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tamasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmæshæth|tæmæshæth]] || [[word:tæmæshæj|tæmæshæj]] || [[word:tæmæshæsh|tæmæshæsh]] || [[word:tæmæshæ|tæmæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamamashath|tamamashath]] || [[word:tamamashaj|tamamashaj]] || [[word:tamamashash|tamamashash]] || [[word:tamamasha|tamamasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamashath|tamashath]] || [[word:tamashaj|tamashaj]] || [[word:tamashash|tamashash]] || [[word:tamasha|tamasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamafshath|tamafshath]] || [[word:tamafshaj|tamafshaj]] || [[word:tamafshash|tamafshash]] || [[word:tamafshaf|tamafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamashatha|tamashatha]] || [[word:tamashaja|tamashaja]] || [[word:tamashasha|tamashasha]] || [[word:tamashaka|tamashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamashath|tamashath]] || [[word:tamashaj|tamashaj]] || [[word:tamashash|tamashash]] || [[word:tamasha|tamasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamashathal|tamashathal]] || [[word:tamashajal|tamashajal]] || [[word:tamashashal|tamashashal]] || [[word:tamashakal|tamashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamashathatha|tamashathatha]] || [[word:tamashajaja|tamashajaja]] || [[word:tamashashasha|tamashashasha]] || [[word:tamashaka|tamashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamashathan|tamashathan]] || [[word:tamashajan|tamashajan]] || [[word:tamashashan|tamashashan]] || [[word:tamashakan|tamashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamashathaoro|tamashathaoro]] || [[word:tamashajaoro|tamashajaoro]] || [[word:tamashashaoro|tamashashaoro]] || [[word:tamashakaoro|tamashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
